description: Extends the org-shared FS-GG preset (github>FS-GG/.github), which provides config:recommended + dependency dashboard + semantic commits, the GitHub Packages registry for FS.GG.*, the FS.GG.UI coherent-set grouping, the -preview channel, and the shared custom managers. This repo adds only the manager that moves the single FS.GG.UI.Template version pin in providers/rendering.providers.yml + README when Rendering publishes — replacing the retired scripts/sync-from-rendering.sh.

packageRules.description: Rewrite the exact pinned FS.GG.UI.* value rather than widening a range (the pin coherence that tests/composition/run.sh enforce).

customManagers.description: Detect the FS.GG.UI.Template version pinned in the rendering provider descriptor and the README, in every surrounding form (`::`, `@`, `/v`). Renovate updates all matched occurrences together, preserving the pin coherence.

hostRules.description: read:packages auth for the private org GitHub Packages NuGet feed (FS.GG.* are not on nuget.org). Lives in this repo's own config — NOT the shared preset — because Renovate does not substitute {{ secrets }} inside presets pulled via extends. Value = org-level Mend App Secret FSGG_PACKAGES_READ_TOKEN.
